_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work with business teams and senior management to ensure awareness of “best practices” on privacy and data security issues.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data flows, access patterns, and retention practices against privacy requirements and privacy-by-design principles.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.596), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.569).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.508). Shared vocabulary: [data, practices, privacy]. DCWF-only terms [awareness, best, business, ensure, issues, management] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, against, conducting, design, engineering, evaluating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.881, R=0.887). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Work with business teams and senior management to ensure awareness of “best prac" and "Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.601 > STS 0.508 (gap +0.093). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, practices, privacy] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.7%. Shared tokens: [data, practices, privacy]. DCWF-only: [awareness, best, business, ensure, issues, management]. WIDAI-only: [access, against, conducting, design, engineering, evaluating].

signals.detail: STS 0.508 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
